languages.text: "А также кощунственная находчивость. Разве результат не будоражит разум, коллега?"
"Blasphemous cunning, to be sure. Does the very spectacle not sear itself upon the mind, colleague?"
languages.original_text: "А также кощунственная находчивость. Разве результат не будоражит разум, коллега?"

traits.locale_text: "Blasphemous cunning, to be sure. Does the very spectacle not sear itself upon the mind, colleague?"
"Blasphemous cunning, to be sure. Does the very spectacle not sear itself upon the mind, colleague?"

languages.text: "Blasphemische Raffinesse, gewiss. Brennt sich das Spektakel selbst nicht in den Verstand, Kollege?"
languages.original_text: "Blasphemous cunning, to be sure. Does the very spectacle not sear itself upon the mind, colleague?"

traits.locale_text: "Blasphemische Raffinesse, gewiss. Brennt sich das Spektakel selbst nicht in den Verstand, Kollege?"

languages.text: “这无疑是亵渎的诡计。难道眼前这一幕没有深深烙印进你的脑海吗，同僚？”
languages.original_text: "Blasphemous cunning, to be sure. Does the very spectacle not sear itself upon the mind, colleague?"

traits.locale_text: “这无疑是亵渎的诡计。难道眼前这一幕没有深深烙印进你的脑海吗，同僚？”

languages.text: « Une ingéniosité blasphématoire, sans nul doute. Ce spectacle n'est-il pas incroyablement marquant ? »
languages.original_text: "Blasphemous cunning, to be sure. Does the very spectacle not sear itself upon the mind, colleague?"

traits.locale_text: « Une ingéniosité blasphématoire, sans nul doute. Ce spectacle n'est-il pas incroyablement marquant ? »

languages.text: «Una astucia blasfema, desde luego. Un espectáculo visual cuya imagen se graba a fuego en la mente, ¿no es verdad, estimado colega?».
languages.original_text: "Blasphemous cunning, to be sure. Does the very spectacle not sear itself upon the mind, colleague?"

traits.locale_text: «Una astucia blasfema, desde luego. Un espectáculo visual cuya imagen se graba a fuego en la mente, ¿no es verdad, estimado colega?».

languages.text: "Kâfirce bir kurnazlık, orası kesin. Bu manzara bile zihne kazınmıyor mu meslektaşım?"
languages.original_text: "Blasphemous cunning, to be sure. Does the very spectacle not sear itself upon the mind, colleague?"

traits.locale_text: "Kâfirce bir kurnazlık, orası kesin. Bu manzara bile zihne kazınmıyor mu meslektaşım?"

languages.text: 「冒涜的な狡知であることは確かです。この光景そのものが、心に焼きついて離れぬとは思いませんか、同僚？」
languages.original_text: "Blasphemous cunning, to be sure. Does the very spectacle not sear itself upon the mind, colleague?"

traits.locale_text: 「冒涜的な狡知であることは確かです。この光景そのものが、心に焼きついて離れぬとは思いませんか、同僚？」
